title: Anniversary Decorations Valentines Day Balloons Arch with Happy Anniversary Banner Heart I Love You Balloons Red Felt Heart Hanging String Rose Petals for Valentines Romantic Decorations
features: Package Includes: Our Anniversary Decorations includes 22pcs 10 inch red heart shaped latex balloons,6pcs 12 inch red printed balloons, 6pcs 12 inch white printed balloons,6pcs 18in red foil heart balloons,1pcs 30in love letter foil balloons,16 inch happy anniversary letter balloons,1 set of I LOVE YOU balloons,50pcs balloon hanging strings,1000pcs silk rose petals,1pcs balloon Ribbon,60 points balloon glue

High Quality: Our anniversary Balloons are made of natural latex materials, safe and non-toxic, and thick enough to keep a good shape for a long time after inflation, so you don't have to worry about bursting in the party

Suitable for a Variety of Occasions: Whether it is Valentines day, Romantic Decorations Special Night ,1 year anniversary, 10th 20th 30th 40th 50th 60th anniversary decorations, bachelor parties, weddings, engagements or any other special events, you can use this love balloons set to celebrate with your love. The Valentines Day balloon set adds a romantic atmosphere in your home

ROSE PETALS: These 1000 rose petals are made of high quality materials, the petals are real and natural and will not fade. You can lay these romantic rose petals on the floor, bed and bathtub, therefore creating a wonderful atmosphere, it is the perfect decoration for your annoversary decor

Customer Service Guarantee: When you get these balloon arch, if you are not satisfied with the party balloons or the balloons are damaged, you can contact us at any time, we will definitely provide excellent service
